/**
 * A complete faalupega record for a Samoan village.
 *
 * All text uses correct Samoan orthography:
 * - Macrons: ā, ē, ī, ō, ū
 * - Glottal stops: ʻ (U+02BB)
 */
export const DEFAULT_VERSION = "1930";

export const amoaSasae = {
    version: "1930",
    name: "Amoa Sasaʻe",
    district: "Faʻasaleleaga",
    island: "Savaiʻi",
    tulou: [
        "Tulouna a oe Salemuliaga",
        "Tulouna a oe le Pule a Leʻuʻu",

        "Tulouna a oe lau fetalaiga a Segi, o le Matua fetalai",

        { title: "Faleloa", details: [] },
    ],
